expected: Active login state is server-side enough to invalidate stale tokens
observed: LoginSession stores one active session key per member and AuthService validates it on every authenticated request

expected: Newest login invalidates older same-member tokens without affecting other members
observed: AuthService renews the member session under lock and old token requests return UNAUTHORIZED

expected: Same-member concurrent login does not leak database uniqueness errors
observed: Member row pessimistic lock serializes session renewal and saveAndFlush keeps failures inside the service boundary

expected: Same-member login race is covered by a real concurrent test
observed: ConcurrentLoginAcceptanceTest uses CountDownLatch and ExecutorService for simultaneous login attempts

expected: Token parsing and invalid-token behavior are directly covered
observed: AuthTokenProviderTest covers payload extraction and invalid token UNAUTHORIZED

expected: Web resolver delegates token and session validation to AuthService
observed: LoginMemberArgumentResolver extracts the bearer token and AuthService authenticates active session state

expected: Old and invalid tokens use intentional authentication failure style
observed: Stale and invalid tokens flow through RoomescapeException UNAUTHORIZED and ErrorResponse

expected: Expected waiting failures use the project ErrorCode and ErrorResponse style
observed: WAITING_NOT_ALLOWED maps to 400 and DUPLICATE_WAITING maps to 409

observed: WaitingAcceptanceTest and WaitingRepositoryIntegrationTest cover oracle flows and DB guard
